elements.title: lang::report_page_055_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT max(kbi_ue.id)                                              AS id,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_u.email,
       MAX(kbi_ue.timecreated)                                     as enrolled,
       kbi_c.id                                                    AS courseid,
       kbi_u.id                                                    AS userid,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       ROUND(AVG(CASE
                   WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                   ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0)                  AS grade,
       MAX(m.modules)                                          AS modules,
       MAX(kbi_cc.timecompleted)                                   AS timecompleted,
       MAX(cmc.completed)                                      as modules_completed,
       round(((MAX(cmc.completed) / MAX(m.modules)) * 100), 0) as progress
FROM mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ue.userid
       JOIN mdl_enrol kbi_e ON kbi_e.id = kbi_ue.enrolid
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_e.courseid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_cohort_members kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi ON kbi_gi.courseid = kbi_c.id AND kbi_gi.itemtype = 'course'
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_g ON kbi_gi.id = kbi_g.itemid AND kbi_g.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_completions kbi_cc ON kbi_cc.timecompleted > 0 AND kbi_cc.course = kbi_e.courseid and kbi_cc.userid = kbi_ue.userid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT course, count(id) as modules
                  FROM mdl_course_modules
                  WHERE visible = 1
                    AND completion > 0
                    AND instance > 0
                  GROUP BY course) as m ON m.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_cm.course, kbi_x.userid, COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_x.id) as completed
                  FROM mdl_course_modules kbi_cm, mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_x
                  WHERE kbi_x.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id
                    AND kbi_cm.visible = 1
                    AND kbi_x.completionstate IN (1, 2)
                  GROUP BY kbi_cm.course, kbi_x.userid) as cmc ON cmc.course = kbi_c.id AND cmc.userid = kbi_ue.userid
WHERE kbi_ue.id > 0
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_ue.status = 0
  AND kbi_e.status = 0
GROUP BY kbi_u.id, kbi_c.id
